name: Cherry Cordials
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the cherries in brandy and place them in a freezer.
2. Melt the chocolate over hot water.
3. When the cherries are frozen, dry each one on paper towels.
4. Quickly dip each cherry into the chocolate, swirling by the stem until completely covered.
5. The chocolate will harden almost immediately. Place the cherries on a wax-paper-lined rack in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
